response.justification: While the candidate is a highly experienced senior software engineer with a strong background in full-stack development (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang), they completely lack the mandatory 5-10 years of C++ development on Windows. Furthermore, they do not have the required domain expertise in Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking, making them fundamentally misaligned with the core requirements of this role.
strengths: Extensive overall software engineering experience (10+ years) across various stacks, architectures, and microservices.
Strong background in modern development practices, including CI/CD pipelines, TDD, and trunk-based development.
Proven leadership and initiative, having worked as a Staff Engineer and founded an open-source platform.
concerns: Critically lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of professional C++ development experience, with only a brief 7-month stint utilizing C/C++ in 2014.
Absence of required domain expertise in Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking systems.
Missing required enterprise relational database experience (SQL Server/Oracle), with recent focus heavily on MongoDB.
